title: Orb of Origin Plus
description: Makes the orb of origin possible to obtain in survival mode.
body:
Makes the orb of origin from the origins mod is possible to obtain in survival mode. Orb of origin shards can be found in ancient city loot chests, very rarely orbs of origin can also be found in them. Crafting orb of origin shards in a plus shape makes the orb of origin.

Planned Features - Orb of origin will play a sound and give you 0-4 orb of origin shards on use.

Recipe:

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zaacAhCS/images/6a8b93ea5ac8326302bd7e0c5f4a63ac98162469.png)
